# MES Label Generation and Printing MES标签生产与打印

# MES Label Generation and Printing MES系统标签生成与打印


### Main Page（总页面）


[图片1: null]


### New Barcode Generation & Printing （新条码生成&打印）


[图片2: null]


说明：
1、新条码打印功能仅用于没有条码，需要生成新条码；
2、需要首先输入P/N（物料料号），根据输入的物料料号系统会自动带出供应商信息；
3、再填写其余信息后，点击打印即可。


Instructions
1）The New Barcode Printing function is only used for generating new barcodes when no barcode exists.
2）You need to first enter the P/N (Part Number). The system will automatically pull up the supplier information based on the entered part number.
3）After filling in the remaining information, click “Print” to proceed.


### Barcode Re-printing（条码补打）


[图片3: null]


说明：
1、此功能仅用于现有条码补打功能；
2、需要下面扫描需要补打的条码，然后补打；
3、此处打印后需要覆盖原条码，REELID一致。


Instructions
1）This function is only for reprinting existing barcodes (i.e., barcode reprint function for existing codes).
2）You need to scan the barcode that requires reprinting below first, then proceed with the reprint.
3）After printing here, the original barcode must be covered, and the REELID must remain consistent.

---
